import pytest
from source import gcd

def test_gcd_bugs_with_infinite_recursion():
    """
    The buggy implementation calls gcd(a % b, b) which causes an infinite recursion
    for inputs where a % b < b (e.g., gcd(35, 21)). The fixed version returns 7.
    """
    assert gcd(35, 21) == 7, "Expected gcd(35, 21) to be 7, but got a different result or recursion error."
